title: Swap memory management — Nodes to report swap capacity as part of node status
text:
A new node status field is now added,
node.status.nodeInfo.swap.capacity
, to report the swap capacity of a node.
As an example, the following command can be used to retrieve the swap capacity of the nodes in a cluster:
kubectl get nodes -o go-template
=
'{{range .items}}{{.metadata.name}}: {{if .status.nodeInfo.swap.capacity}}{{.status.nodeInfo.swap.capacity}}{{else}}<unknown>{{end}}{{"\n"}}{{end}}'
This will result in an output similar to:
node1: 21474836480
node2: 42949664768
node3: <unknown>
